tree.title: 简单句
tree.description: 只包含一个主谓结构的句子

children.title: 五大基本句型
children.description: 英语句子的基础构建模块

children.title: 主语 + 谓语 (S+V)
children.example: Birds sing.

children.title: 主语 + 谓语 + 宾语 (S+V+O)
children.example: I read books.
children.pattern: 主语 + 及物动词 + 宾语

children.title: 主语 + 谓语 + 间接宾语 + 直接宾语 (S+V+IO+DO)
children.example: She gave me a book.
children.pattern: 主语 + 及物动词 + 间接宾语 + 直接宾语

children.title: 主语 + 谓语 + 宾语 + 补语 (S+V+O+OC)
children.example: They elected him president.
children.pattern: 主语 + 及物动词 + 宾语 + 宾语补语

children.title: 主语 + 系动词 + 表语 (S+V+C)
children.example: She is a teacher.
children.pattern: 主语 + 系动词 + 表语/名词/形容词

children.title: 不及物动词
children.example: The sun rises.
children.pattern: 无需宾语，独立表达完整意义

children.title: 及物动词
children.example: I understand the problem.
children.pattern: 需要宾语来完整表达意义

children.title: 系动词
children.example: She looks tired.
children.pattern: 连接主语与表语，说明主语状态

children.title: 助动词与情态动词
children.example: I can swim. She has finished.
children.pattern: 协助主要动词表达时态、语气等

tree.title: 并列句
tree.description: 由并列连词连接的多个简单句

examples.example: I studied hard and passed the exam.
Study hard, or you will fail.
It rained, so we stayed home.
I stayed, for I had nothing else to do.
Both you and I are students.
Either you come or I go.
Neither he nor she was there.
Not only did he come, but he also helped.

tree.title: 复合句
tree.description: 包含主句和从句的句子

children.title: 名词性从句
children.description: 在句中起名词作用的从句

children.title: that从句
children.example: I know that he is right.

children.title: whether/if从句
children.example: I wonder whether she will come.

children.title: 疑问词从句
children.example: Tell me what you want.

children.title: 定语从句
children.description: 修饰名词或代词的从句

examples.example: The man who came here is my teacher.
The man whom we saw is here.
The book which I bought is interesting.
The book that belongs to me is new.
The student whose homework is missing is here.
This is the place where we met.
I still remember the day when we first met.
Tell me the reason why you left.

children.title: 限制性定语从句
children.example: The book that belongs to me is new.
children.description: 必不可少的修饰语，缺少后句意不完整

children.title: 非限制性定语从句
children.example: My brother, who lives in Beijing, is a teacher.
children.description: 补充说明，可用逗号去掉而不影响主句意义

children.title: 状语从句
children.description: 修饰动词、形容词或整个句子的从句

children.title: 时间状语从句
children.example: I will call you when I arrive.

children.title: 原因状语从句
children.example: I study hard because I want to pass.

children.title: 结果状语从句
children.example: It was so hot that we couldn't sleep.

children.title: 目的状语从句
children.example: I studied hard so that I could pass.

children.title: 条件状语从句
children.example: If it rains, we will stay home.

children.title: 让步状语从句
children.example: Although it rained, we went out.

children.title: 方式状语从句
children.example: She acted as if she were the boss.

children.title: 比较状语从句
children.example: He is taller than I am.

children.title: 完全倒装
children.example: Here comes the teacher.
children.pattern: 表语/状语 + 谓语 + 主语

children.title: 部分倒装
children.example: Never have I seen such a thing.
children.pattern: 助动词/情态动词 + 主语 + 动词原形

children.title: 被动语态
children.description: 强调动作承受者的语态

patterns.example: The book is read by students.
The job had been done before he came.
The project will be completed next month.

children.title: 强调句
children.description: 强调句子某个成分的结构

patterns.example: It was I that met him yesterday.

children.title: 省略句
examples: If possible, come early. (If it is possible)
The more, the better. (The more..., the better...)
